businessSummary.oneLiner: Government and commercial AI data analytics platform leader — Gotham (defense), Foundry (enterprise), AIP (AI platform)
businessSummary.description: Palantir provides data integration, analytics, and AI decision-making platforms for government and commercial organizations. FY2025 revenue $4.48B (+56% YoY), Q4 revenue $1.41B (+70% YoY, all-time high). Closed Tuesday (3/17) at $155.08 (+1.55%). Seeking Alpha upgraded Hold→Buy. $10B, 10-year US Army contract anchors long-term government revenue. Keel Holdings Navy ShipOS modernization partnership also announced.
howTheyMakeMoney: AIP Bootcamps (5-day pilots to enterprise-wide rollout)
keyProducts: Sovereign AI Datacenter OS — NVIDIA joint architecture

keyMetrics.name: P/E (TTM)
keyMetrics.interpretation: 9x S&P 500 avg. Mid-range among AI SaaS peers (Datadog 290x)

keyMetrics.name: Forward P/E
keyMetrics.interpretation: Based on FY2026 guidance $7.18-7.20B (+61%). Still premium

keyMetrics.name: Revenue Growth (YoY)
keyMetrics.interpretation: FY2025 $4.48B. US commercial revenue +137%. Growth accelerating

keyMetrics.name: Operating Margin
keyMetrics.interpretation: Top-tier SaaS margin. Q4 GAAP net income $609M

growthDrivers.title: $10B, 10-Year US Army Contract
growthDrivers.description: Seeking Alpha upgrade trigger. Long-term revenue anchor for government segment. 'The Boeing of AI era.'

growthDrivers.title: Keel Holdings — US Navy ShipOS Modernization
growthDrivers.description: AI partnership for Navy shipbuilding. Defense AI expanding from Army to Navy.

growthDrivers.title: AIPCon 9 + Sovereign AI OS with NVIDIA
growthDrivers.description: Military AI combat demos. Joint sovereign datacenter OS with NVIDIA. Palantir president spoke at GTC.

growthDrivers.title: Iran War Combat Validation
growthDrivers.description: CEO Karp confirmed US military using Palantir software for tactical advantage in Iran operations. Best possible reference for future contracts.

growthDrivers.title: FY2026 Guidance $7.18-7.20B (+61%)
growthDrivers.description: Growth accelerating. US commercial +137%. AIP adoption driving enterprise expansion.

competitiveAdvantage.summary: Unrivaled defense AI leader with 20 years of security clearances and mission-critical references. AIP driving rapid commercial expansion.

moats.description: 20 years of highest-level US government security clearances. Competitors cannot replicate quickly.
Active use in Iran war operations. 'Battle-tested AI' is the ultimate sales tool.
Bootcamp to enterprise-wide pattern. Extremely high switching costs once deployed.

competitors.name: Anduril
competitors.detail: $20B defense contract vehicle secured — most direct competitor emerging

competitors.name: Microsoft (Azure Government)
competitors.detail: Government cloud #1. JEDI/JWCC contracts for defense AI

competitors.name: C3.ai
competitors.detail: Enterprise AI. Smaller scale but similar positioning

recentNews.headline: Seeking Alpha: Hold→Buy upgrade. $10B Army contract as key catalyst
recentNews.significance: Recognition of transformation to product-led SaaS. Symbolic upgrade

recentNews.headline: Keel Holdings Navy ShipOS AI partnership announced
recentNews.significance: Defense AI scope expanding from Army to Navy shipbuilding modernization

recentNews.headline: Anduril secures $20B defense contract vehicle
recentNews.significance: Emerging competitor challenging Palantir's defense AI monopoly

recentNews.headline: Insider selling continues — ~$6M/day in 2026
recentNews.significance: Sustained insider selling despite -14.78% YTD. Weighs on sentiment

recentNews.headline: CEO Karp: Still using Anthropic Claude despite Pentagon blacklist
recentNews.significance: 6-month phase-out pending. AI model transition risk and cost

analystOpinions.notableComment: Consensus $136 (-12.3%) below current price. But SA Hold→Buy upgrade is symbolic. 56% growth at P/E 246x is the tension — strong growth but premium pricing.

risks.title: Insider Selling ~$6M/Day
risks.description: Sustained selling throughout 2026 despite YTD -14.78%. Negative confidence signal.

risks.title: Extreme Valuation — P/E 246x, Below Consensus
risks.description: Current price above consensus $136. Growth priced in aggressively.

risks.title: Anthropic-Pentagon Conflict — AI Model Transition Risk
risks.description: 6-month Claude phase-out. Model switching costs and capability gaps.

risks.title: Anduril $20B Contract Vehicle — Monopoly Threat
risks.description: Direct competitor gaining government access at scale.

risks.title: SBC Dilution
risks.description: Stock-based compensation continues diluting per-share value.

buyReasons.title: $10B Army + Navy ShipOS: Full Defense AI Stack
buyReasons.rationale: 10-year contract with expanding scope. Structural increase in defense AI spending.

buyReasons.title: FY2026 Guidance +61% — Growth Accelerating
buyReasons.rationale: US commercial +137%, Q4 +70%. Growth rate actually increasing.

buyReasons.title: Iran War Combat Validation
buyReasons.rationale: Battle-tested AI is the ultimate reference. Should drive additional defense contracts.

buyReasons.title: Zero Debt, $5.23B Cash, 47% FCF Margin
buyReasons.rationale: Fortress balance sheet. Can weather any economic downturn.

overallOpinion: Palantir broke above its 50-day SMA at $155.08 (+1.55%). SA Hold→Buy upgrade, Navy ShipOS partnership, and $10B Army contract strengthen the growth narrative.
But insider selling at $6M/day, Anthropic model transition risk, and Anduril's $20B contract are real concerns. P/E 246x with consensus below current price.
50-day breakout is positive but needs 200-day ($163) confirmation. Earnings need to catch up to valuation. Watch and wait.

investmentVerdict.summary: Defense AI leader position strengthening but P/E 246x and $6M/day insider selling create headwinds. Consensus target below current price. 50-day breakout needs earnings confirmation.

x.hook: Palantir upgraded to Buy. But insiders sell $6M every day.
